Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in the review process
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants that include a subsequent SW-Reviewer Agreed activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed appears before any revision decision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Average time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and First Look-Your updates are overdue in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurred earlier in the trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'First Look-Your updates are overdue'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Awaiting Assignment to Batch in variants that contain SW-Reviewer Agreed and end with Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Awaiting Assignment to Batch'
